title: Mobile PWA App Shell
summary: Implemented an installable mobile PWA shell with manifest metadata, app icons, offline fallback, safe service-worker caching, mobile app metadata, and a safe-area-aware bottom tab bar.
next_action: Open the app on a mobile viewport or device and validate install, navigation, and offline fallback behavior visually.
reference_examples: Existing command palette and People/Todos navigation

verification.notes: `MIX_ARCHIVES=/tmp/maraithon-mix-archives-otp26 mix compile --force --warnings-as-errors` passed. `MIX_ARCHIVES=/tmp/maraithon-mix-archives-otp26 mix test test/maraithon_web/pwa_static_test.exs test/maraithon_web/live/people_live_test.exs` passed with 8 tests, 0 failures. `MIX_ARCHIVES=/tmp/maraithon-mix-archives-otp26 mix precommit` passed with 1921 tests, 0 failures, and assistant_eval 60/60. The MIX_ARCHIVES prefix isolates OTP 26 from a stale OTP 28 Hex archive in the local environment.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the mobile PWA app shell, static PWA assets, safe service worker, mobile app metadata, mobile bottom navigation, and focused PWA coverage; full precommit passed.
resume_context.notes: Service worker intentionally avoids caching authenticated HTML, API responses, or user data. Verification used isolated MIX_ARCHIVES because the default Hex archive was polluted by an OTP 28 process.

history.note: Created a mobile PWA app-shell specification from the user's request and app design constraints.
Implemented manifest, app icons, service worker, offline fallback, mobile metadata, and mobile shell navigation.
Completed and verified with focused PWA and People tests plus full `mix precommit`.
